title: Zyphers(Makos) Textures!
description: I made this because of my YSM (Yes Steve Models) character! I hope you enjoy what I made!
body:
# This is a basic texturepack I will be adding new items to every so often!

_Not sure when the next item will be but keep an eye out!_

**The current textures changed are!**
- Goat Horn!
- JukeBox!








All textures and future textures are simply made for fun. Thank you for checking out my creation.
